description: Live status of every isMine action item parsed from the meeting reports under actionItemsDir, maintained by the meeting-action-items-followup orchestration. One entry per scheduler run with a stable id per run. Surfaces overdue / aging / new-today / recently-closed / orphaned buckets, plus per-item Mark-done / Dismiss buttons that invoke Shared/scripts/mark-ledger-item.ps1 to mutate the Zakira ledger directly. Pinned when any item is overdue. A companion daily summary lives at the Zakira category `action-items-ledger:daily-summary` for consumption by the future daily-morning-digest composer.

contentTemplate.label: Overdue
contentTemplate.description: Use level 'error' when overdue items exist; omit otherwise. Body bullets the top 5 overdue items with priority, action text, and deadline.

contentTemplate.title: Overdue
contentTemplate.description: Open items whose deadline is in the past. Each item is a nested section titled `<PRIORITY> - <action>` containing a keyValue with Meeting/Priority/Deadline/Source/Status/Report and two CLI actions: Mark done (calls mark-ledger-item.ps1 with -Action completed) and Dismiss (with -Action dismissed). onSuccess=keep so the entry survives single-item button clicks.

contentTemplate.title: Aging
contentTemplate.description: Open items without a deadline whose age exceeds the per-priority staleDays threshold (HIGH=2d, MEDIUM=5d, LOW=14d by default). Same nested-section + per-item Mark done / Dismiss action shape as Overdue.

contentTemplate.title: New today
contentTemplate.description: Items added to the ledger during this scheduler tick because they appeared in a parsed meeting report for the first time.

contentTemplate.title: Recently closed
contentTemplate.description: Items closed within the last recentlyClosedHours window (default 48). Default-collapsed. Includes implicit closures (file shows `- [x]`) and manual closures (Mark done / Dismiss). Useful for spotting accidental closures and for a sense of throughput.

contentTemplate.title: Orphaned
contentTemplate.description: Items the ledger had as open but whose source meeting file was re-processed without them. Auto-closed with closeReason=source-file-no-longer-lists-item. Default-collapsed.

contentTemplate.label: Run Notes
contentTemplate.description: Free-form footer with the run id, dryRun and forceSurface flags so the entry is self-describing.

expectedActions.label: Open action-items folder
expectedActions.description: Opens the local Meeting Action Items folder (the configured actionItemsDir).

expectedActions.label: Open Orchestra: Action Items list in To Do
expectedActions.description: Convenience link to the Microsoft To Do list this orchestration syncs into.

expectedActions.label: Dismiss
expectedActions.description: Archive this run summary without further action.
